name: Laramide Resources Ltd.
description: Laramide Resources Ltd. is a Canadian-based company focused on the exploration and development of high-quality uranium assets in Australia and the United States. The company's portfolio includes the Westmoreland Uranium Project in Queensland, Australia, and several advanced-stage projects in the United States, such as the Churchrock and Crownpoint In-Situ Recovery (ISR) projects in New Mexico. Laramide is committed to creating shareholder value by advancing its resource base through discovery and development while maintaining high environmental and social standards in the jurisdictions where it operates.
